info.name: mseONE PoC API
info.description:
This collection contains requests for the mseONE PoC API.

The API is built with FastAPI + Strawberry (GraphQL) and is designed to expose project metadata with filtering and pagination.

### Authentication

All requests to `/graphql` require a Bearer token.  
For local development use:  
Authorization: Bearer devtoken123

The `/healthz` endpoint does not require authentication.

### Base URL

- Local: [http://localhost:8001](http://localhost:8001)
    
- (later) Azure Deployed: https://.azurewebsites.net
    

### Contents

- Health Check (REST GET)
    
- GraphQL – Project By ID
    
- GraphQL – Projects List (with filtering and pagination)
    

### Notes

- Results will later be persisted to Azure Storage.
    
- In Phase 2, the API will validate Azure AD tokens instead of the local dev token.

request.description:
Simple health endpoint to verify that the API is up and running.

### Method

GET /healthz

### Authentication

Not required.

### Response

200 OK  
{  
"status": "ok"  
}
